sql.if: AND (t.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.TARGET_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT sh.target_id AS registId, sh.target_id AS targetId, t.NAME AS targetName, COALESCE(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.connected_ip) AS targetIp, sh.started AS startedAt, sh.status AS status, sh.regdate AS regDate, COALESCE(ptg.name, '미그룹') AS groupName FROM pi_scan_history sh INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON sh.target_id = t.target_id AND sh.ap_no = t.ap_no LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON tg.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND t.AP_NO = tg.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_target_group ptg ON tg.up_idx = ptg.idx WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
ORDER BY sh.regdate DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_scan_history sh INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON sh.target_id = t.target_id AND sh.ap_no = t.ap_no WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
SELECT ap_no FROM pi_targets WHERE target_id = #{targetId} LIMIT 1

sql.if: AND (t.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR f.path LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

choose.when: AND dp.processing_flag IS NOT NULL AND dp.processing_flag != 0

/* 필터 없는 경우: 서브쿼리 페이지네이션 (fast path) */ SELECT sub.hash_id AS resultId, sub.hash_id AS findNo, sub.path AS findPath, sub.regdate AS findDate, t2.TARGET_ID AS targetId, t2.NAME AS targetName, COALESCE(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.connected_ip) AS targetIp, s.data_type AS datatype, CASE WHEN dp.processing_flag IS NOT NULL AND dp.processing_flag != 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS processYn, CASE WHEN dp.approval_status = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN dp.approval_status = 'N' THEN 'N' ELSE NULL END AS trueYn, COALESCE(ptg.name, '미그룹') AS groupName FROM ( SELECT f.hash_id, f.path, f.regdate, f.target_id, f.ap_no FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.target_id = t.target_id AND f.ap_no = t.ap_no WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND (t.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR f.path LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND f.regdate >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND f.regdate <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
ORDER BY f.regdate DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit} ) sub INNER JOIN pi_targets t2 ON sub.target_id = t2.target_id AND sub.ap_no = t2.ap_no LEFT JOIN pi_summary s ON sub.target_id = s.target_id AND sub.ap_no = s.ap_no AND sub.hash_id = s.object_id LEFT JOIN pi_data_processing dp ON sub.target_id = dp.target_id AND sub.ap_no = dp.ap_no AND sub.hash_id = dp.hash_id LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t2.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t2.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON tg.TARGET_ID = t2.TARGET_ID AND t2.AP_NO = tg.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_target_group ptg ON tg.up_idx = ptg.idx
choose.otherwise:
/* status 필터 있는 경우: 기존 방식 (dp JOIN 필수) */ SELECT f.hash_id AS resultId, f.hash_id AS findNo, f.path AS findPath, f.regdate AS findDate, t.TARGET_ID AS targetId, t.NAME AS targetName, COALESCE(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.connected_ip) AS targetIp, s.data_type AS datatype, CASE WHEN dp.processing_flag IS NOT NULL AND dp.processing_flag != 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS processYn, CASE WHEN dp.approval_status = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN dp.approval_status = 'N' THEN 'N' ELSE NULL END AS trueYn, COALESCE(ptg.name, '미그룹') AS groupName FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.target_id = t.target_id AND f.ap_no = t.ap_no LEFT JOIN pi_summary s ON f.target_id = s.target_id AND f.ap_no = s.ap_no AND f.hash_id = s.object_id LEFT JOIN pi_data_processing dp ON f.target_id = dp.target_id AND f.ap_no = dp.ap_no AND f.hash_id = dp.hash_id LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON tg.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND t.AP_NO = tg.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_target_group ptg ON tg.up_idx = ptg.idx WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
ORDER BY f.regdate DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.target_id = t.target_id AND f.ap_no = t.ap_no
LEFT JOIN pi_data_processing dp ON f.target_id = dp.target_id AND f.ap_no = dp.ap_no AND f.hash_id = dp.hash_id
WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y'

SELECT f.hash_id AS resultId, f.hash_id AS findNo, f.path AS findPath, f.account AS account, f.owner AS owner, f.regdate AS findDate, f.credate AS createDate, t.TARGET_ID AS targetId, t.NAME AS targetName, COALESCE(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.connected_ip) AS targetIp, t.PLATFORM AS targetOs, s.data_type AS datatype, s.match_count AS matchCount, CASE WHEN dp.processing_flag IS NOT NULL AND dp.processing_flag != 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS processYn, dp.approval_status AS approvalStatus, dp.notepad AS notepad, dp.user_no AS processUserNo, dp.regdate AS processDate, COALESCE(ptg.name, '미그룹') AS groupName FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.target_id = t.target_id AND f.ap_no = t.ap_no LEFT JOIN pi_summary s ON f.target_id = s.target_id AND f.ap_no = s.ap_no AND f.hash_id = s.object_id LEFT JOIN pi_data_processing dp ON f.target_id = dp.target_id AND f.ap_no = dp.ap_no AND f.hash_id = dp.hash_id LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON tg.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND t.AP_NO = tg.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_target_group ptg ON tg.up_idx = ptg.idx WHERE f.hash_id = #{resultId} LIMIT 1

SELECT scan_stat.scheduledCount, scan_stat.runningCount, scan_stat.completedCount, scan_stat.errorCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.target_id = t.target_id AND f.ap_no = t.ap_no WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y') AS totalFindings FROM ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'scheduled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scheduledCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'running' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS runningCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'error' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS errorCount FROM pi_scan_history ) scan_stat

SELECT du.STD_ID AS stdId, du.DATATYPE_ID AS datatypeId, du.DATATYPE_LABEL AS datatypeLabel, du.DATATYPE AS datatype, du.CREATE_USER AS createUser, du.OCR AS ocr, du.RECENT AS recent, du.CAPTURE AS capture, du.EXTENSION AS extension, du.AP_NO AS apNo, du.REGDATE AS regDate FROM pi_datatypes_user du WHERE du.ENABLE = 1 AND du.AP_NO = 0
AND du.DATATYPE_LABEL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY du.DATATYPE_LABEL
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(DATATYPE_ID), 'DT_0') FROM pi_datatypes_user WHERE DATATYPE_ID LIKE 'DT_%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_datatypes_user ( DATATYPE_ID, STD_ID, DATATYPE_LABEL, CREATE_USER, DATATYPE, OCR, RECENT, CAPTURE, EXTENSION, AP_NO, ENABLE, REGDATE ) VALUES ( #{datatypeId}, #{stdId}, #{datatypeLabel}, #{createUser}, #{datatype}, #{ocr}, #{recent}, #{capture}, #{extension}, #{apNo}, 1, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_datatypes_user SET DATATYPE_LABEL = #{datatypeLabel}, DATATYPE = #{datatype}, OCR = #{ocr}, RECENT = #{recent}, CAPTURE = #{capture}, EXTENSION = #{extension} WHERE STD_ID = #{stdId} AND ENABLE = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_scan_policy WHERE STD_ID = #{stdId} AND ENABLE = 1
